results.description: THE U.S. ARMY CORPS OF ENGINEERS IS SEEKING TO PURCHASE ONE (1) PATROL BOAT WITH AN IN-LINE JET ENGINE AND TOWING TRAILER UNDER NAICS CODE: 336612 FOR A SMALL BUSINESS SIZE STANDARD OF UP TO 1,000 EMPLOYEES.
